title: Minecraft Infinity (Terrain Gen)
description: Part of my MC infinity set, this one changes the terrain gen by adding a few biomes
body:
## This is a simple Biome generation mod that adds (at the time) 5 overworld and 2 nether biomes, with cool sounds and visuals to accompany each. I also added a new recipie for ancient debris because the nether is very difficult now. found most of the sounds from pixabay, the other one that plays in the rolling windy hills biome is the cherry grove minecraft soothing scenes

works best with the amplified nether mod, and the shaders that work best either rethinking voxels, seus renewed, or super duper vanilla 

**THIS PROJECT IS NO LONGER RECEIVING UPDATES, PLEASE GO [HERE](https://modrinth.com/mod/for-the-love-of-updates)**


Made with McReator.
